REQUIREMENTS

Course Title

Credits

Select three ARTH courses at the 2xx level, one of which may be a Big 9 Question course 1

Select three ARTH3xx or ARTH4xx level courses

9

Total Credits

18

1 These courses, include, but are not limited to, the following: ARTH200, ARTH201, ARTH221, ARTH230, ARTH250, ARTH255, ARTH275, ARTH290, ARTH290

A total of six (6) credits may be transferred into the minor from other institutions or programs. These transferred credits include those from study-abroad programs. Study-abroad credit requires the prior approval of the Director of Undergraduate Studies.

All courses presented for the minor must be passed with a grade of "C-" or better.

An overall GPA of 2.0 in the minor is required for graduation.

Art History Minor 1
